name: InfraCredit
description: AAA‑rated specialised infrastructure credit guarantee institution backed by the Nigeria Sovereign Investment Authority, GuarantCo, KfW Development Bank and Africa Finance Corporation. Provides local currency guarantees and mobilises long‑term debt financing for infrastructure in Nigeria.

[Learn more ](https://infracredit.ng/portfolio/transitioning-to-a-low-carbon-economy/)We supported North South Power’s issuance of the first 15year corporate green infrastructure bond in Nigeria to finance its hydro power capacity expansion Business Planning Unlocking long-term local currency infrastructure finance in Nigeria
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='538'%20height='698'%20viewBox='0%200%20538%20698'%3E%3C/svg%3E)_linked_camera_ AERIAL VIEW OF SHIRORO HYDROELECTRIC POWER PLANT, NIGER STATE [Click Here ](https://infracredit.ng/portfolio/transitioning-to-a-low-carbon-economy/) ![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='538'%20height='698'%20viewBox='0%200%20538%20698'%3E%3C/svg%3E)[Learn more ](https://infracredit.ng/climate-facility/)The Climate Finance Blending Facility ( the “Facility”) is a catalytic first loss multi-donor facility seeded with £10 million concessional funding by the UK Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office (“FCDO”) to co-finance off-grid energy investments alongside Infracredit’s local currency guarantees in Nigeria. Business Planning Unlocking Long-Term Local
Currency Climate Finance for Off-Grid Energy Access in Nigeria ![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='577'%20height='469'%20viewBox='0%200%20577%20469'%3E%3C/svg%3E)_linked_camera_ The Programme is in 32 States Across The Six Geo-Political Zones in Nigeria. [Click Here ](https://infracredit.ng/climate-facility/) [Learn more ](https://infracredit.ng/portfolio/energising-a-sustainable-economy/)We supported Viathan Group's issuance of the first 10 year corporate infrastructure bond in Nigerian debt capital markets to expand its installed energy capacity and construct a compressed natural gas plant Business Planning Mobilizing private sector investment in infrastructure ![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='538'%20height='698'%20viewBox='0%200%20538%20698'%3E%3C/svg%3E)_linked_camera_ ISLAND POWER GENERATION COMPANY IN LEKKI, LAGOS [Click Here ](https://infracredit.ng/portfolio/energising-a-sustainable-economy/) [Learn more ](https://infracredit.ng/portfolio/providing-value-added-logistics-and-distribution-services/)We supported Transport Services Limited’s issuance of the first 10-year infrastructure bond in the transportation and logistics sector. Unlocking long-term local currency infrastructure finance in Nigeria _linked_camera_ VIEW TSL PROJECT IMPACT [Click Here ](https://infracredit.ng/portfolio/providing-value-added-logistics-and-distribution-services/) [Learn more ](https://infracredit.ng/portfolio/improving-nigerias-economy-and-ease-of-doing-business-through-an-integrated-industrial-hub/)We enabled Lagos Free Zone Company access the longest tenor financing in the Nigerian corporate bond market, and extended the yield curve for corporate debt to a record 20 years Deepening the domestic debt capital markets _linked_camera_ AERIAL VIEW OF THE LAGOS FREE ZONE, LAGOS [Click Here ](https://infracredit.ng/portfolio/improving-nigerias-economy-and-ease-of-doing-business-through-an-integrated-industrial-hub/) [Learn more ](https://infracredit.ng/portfolio/providing-cleaner-energy-solutions/)We collaborated with USAID to provide the first co-guarantee for a local currency infrastructure bond to support GEL Utility Limited’s power evacuation and expansion plans Deepening the domestic debt capital markets _linked_camera_ GEL UTILITY OFF GRID POWER PLANT, RIVERS STATE [Click Here ](https://infracredit.ng/portfolio/providing-cleaner-energy-solutions/) [Learn more ](https://infracredit.ng/infracredit-secures-strategic-investment-from-mobilist-and-marks-its-listing-on-nasd-as-it-transitions-to-a-public-company/)InfraCredit Secures Strategic Investment from MOBILIST and Marks Its Listing on NASD as It Transitions to a Public Company _linked_camera_ At InfraCredit's Public Listing of its Shares on NASD Exchange in April, 2025 [Click Here ](https://infracredit.ng/infracredit-secures-strategic-investment-from-mobilist-and-marks-its-listing-on-nasd-as-it-transitions-to-a-public-company/)
